basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer and Associate Project Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.post_name: Project Engineer and Associate Project Engineer
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Project Engineer and Associate Project Engineer Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. IITG/II&SI/Project Staff Rectt-2026/123 on the official IIT Guwahati website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Guwahati Project Engineer and Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering, Bachelor Degree in Electrical Engineering
qualification.details: Project Engineer: Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering with experience of at least 6 years in relevant field of works. Associate Project Engineer: Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering with experience of at least 3 years in relevant field of work. Associate Project Engineer: Bachelor Degree in Electrical Engineering with experience of at least 3 years in relevant field of work.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Project Engineer and Associate Project Engineer posts is 17th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the posts of Project Engineer and Associate Project Engineer in IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: For the Project Engineer post, candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering with at least 6 years of relevant work experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Associate Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Associate Project Engineer position is Rs. 49,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Engineer and Associate Project Engineer posts will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article by clicking on the provided link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: IIT Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any specific age-related information.
